prompt: The user explicitly activated Grill. Three real decision branches remain, but no handoff is near, the user did not ask to save, and there is no settled conclusion plus open discriminator.
must: treat at least three real branches as independently sufficient usefulness under the existing explicit Grill authority
keep any Decision map optional while preserving the three branches in the supporting checkpoint
must_not: require an explicit save request, approaching handoff, or a settled conclusion plus open discriminator
count invented or merely worded alternatives as real branches
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it isolates the three-real-branches usefulness trigger and does not prove live model behavior.
